input_question: Give me gastric cancer related research
decomposed_queries: Which trials have Cancer type LIKE 'Gastric%'?
top_candidate_question: What trials have Cancer type equal to Gastric/GEJ?
top_candidate_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Control regimen", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Gastric/GEJ';
